MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Michel, Esq., 415.239.4949, for Defendants Arthelle Davis and Erinn Davis; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ARTHELLE DAVIS and ERINN DAVIS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted as to both Defendants, for good cause shown. No opposition was filed. Defendants shall file their answer within 10 days after entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2004-2, A HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
is Off calendar as moot. The Sheriff rejected the creditor's opposition to the claim of exemption as untimely. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
